publishedAbstract: * NooBaa is in a degraded state * The NooBaa High Availability (HA) Cluster Resource only has One Healthy Database * `NooBaa database cluster` shows degraded state with only 1 of 2 instances ready * StorageCluster yaml is in phase "progressing" and/or not ready due to NooBaa errors After confirming that at least one healthy database can assume the "Primary" database role, it is determined that a problematic database must be failed over to bring in a new `noobaa-db-pg-cluster-x` resource and reconcile the Cloud Native PostgreSQL (CNPG) cluster to 2/2 instances `Ready`.
publishedTitle: How to Recover the High Availability (HA) NooBaa Database After a CNPG Instance Failure in OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) v4.19+
